## Checklist

- [ ] Every new screen has loading, empty, and error states
- [ ] Every AI-generated text element has a visible source badge
- [ ] No Aadhar or sensitive PII collected or logged
- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` passes with zero errors
- [ ] ESLint passes with zero errors
- [ ] Unit test coverage remains at or above 90%
- [ ] New Firestore collections have security rules and unit tests
- [ ] i18n: all new UI strings added to both en.json and hi.json
- [ ] JSDoc added to all new public functions and custom hooks
